summary: Iteration 5 testing completed for 3 new features: enhanced Excel import with group detection, Excel export endpoint, and chart configs persistence. Backend: 11/11 pytest tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI flows verified (Export button visible on board, Chart view with add/remove/save, Import dialog mode toggle + existing board selector). No critical or minor issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: import_routes.py is ~370 lines and growing (group parsing, type guessing, options extraction, and create+append branches in one file). Consider splitting group detection helpers into a utils module for maintainability.
export_routes.py hardcodes style colors and group palette - extract to shared constants module to align with GROUP_COLORS used in import_routes.py.

board_routes.update_board allows arbitrary structure inside chart_configs (List[Dict[str, Any]]) without schema validation; consider a ChartConfig Pydantic model to reject malformed configs and prevent unbounded dict payloads.

import_routes 'existing_board_id' branch does not verify that the current user is a member/owner of the target board before appending; add authorization check (similar to other endpoints) to prevent append into unrelated boards.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Pipeline_Import board during backend tests and deleted it in cleanup. Frontend test reused existing 'Pipeline Test' board (id 8110ddb1-2cd2-4ce6-a27d-a4ef5120744a). Saved chart configs persist on that board (non-destructive).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 iteration-5 features are fully working. Backend tests live in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration5_features.py and can be re-run via: pytest backend/tests/test_iteration5_features.py -v. The test Excel file is downloaded to /tmp/test_pipeline.xlsx on the first run (see test). The pipeline_test board (8110ddb1-2cd2-4ce6-a27d-a4ef5120744a) is used for frontend verification. Chart configs are persisted to board.chart_configs array.

passed: Backend: POST /api/import/excel with Pipeline_1776946736.xlsx detects 4 groups (Pipeline, Completed, NFA, Enquiry - Working On) with 203 items (verified groups>=3 and key names present)
Backend: GET /api/groups/board/{id} and /api/items/board/{id} confirm groups+items persisted after import
Backend: POST /api/import/excel?existing_board_id=X appends new groups+items to existing board (group and item counts grow)
Backend: POST /api/import/excel with no workspace_id and no existing_board_id returns 400
Backend: GET /api/export/excel/{board_id} returns valid .xlsx (PK magic bytes, proper content-type, parseable by openpyxl with >10 cells)
Backend: PUT /api/boards/{id} with {chart_configs:[...]} saves configs and returns them in response
Backend: GET /api/boards/{id} returns saved chart_configs with correct titles
Backend: PUT /api/boards/{id} with new chart_configs fully replaces previous configs
Frontend: Login -> navigate to Pipeline Test board -> [data-testid=export-board-btn] present, visible, enabled
Frontend: Board shows 'Pipeline (54)' group confirming smart group detection from Excel import
Frontend: Chart tab ([data-testid=chart-tab]) clickable -> Board Charts view with Save and Add Chart buttons; clicking Add Chart creates a new chart card; clicking Save persists charts
Frontend: Import dialog opens from home -> has dropzone, 'New Board' and 'Existing Board' mode toggles, board-name input (new mode), and board-select dropdown (existing mode) all working
